narrative: Deepwater Horizon oil platform exploded killing 11 workers; 4.9 million barrels of oil spilled into Gulf of Mexico over 87 days; largest accidental marine oil spill in history; extensive coastal ecosystem damage
resolution: Well capped after 87 days; 65 billion dollar total cost; criminal guilty plea; extensive Gulf restoration programme; brand severely damaged long-term
source: Presidential Commission on BP Deepwater Horizon Oil Spill
